name: Dependency Upgrade Risk Review
shortDescription: Classifies dependency upgrade risk and recommends regression focus areas.
longDescription: Analyzes version-change diffs and provides deterministic risk classification plus test focus guidance for safer upgrades.
author: ARS Platform

outputs.name: test_focus_plan
outputs.description: Recommended regression test focus for upgrades.

includedAssets.name: scripts/dependency_diff_risk.py
includedAssets.description: Classifies risk by semantic version delta between manifests.

includedAssets.name: references/risk-matrix.md
includedAssets.description: Dependency upgrade risk matrix and escalation criteria.

includedAssets.name: references/test-focus-template.md
includedAssets.description: Template for targeted regression planning after upgrades.

failureModes: Semver can misrepresent true behavior changes.
Transitive dependency shifts may be underreported.
Missing changelog context weakens triage quality.

examples.title: Framework major upgrade review
examples.summary: Flags major runtime and framework upgrades for high-risk gating.
examples.outputPreview: High-risk finding with regression test focus plan

changelog.summary: Initial release for dependency upgrade risk classification.
